nasb.text: Then the king said to his servants, “Do you not know that a prince and a great man has fallen this day in Israel?

esv.text: And the king said to his servants, “Do you not know that a prince and a great man has fallen this day in Israel?

cnv.text: 王對他的臣僕說：“你們不知道今天在以色列中，有一位將領和偉人倒斃了嗎？

ccb.text: 大卫王对他的随从说：“你们难道不知道今天以色列损失了一位伟大的将领吗？
